name: brownie-to-ape
description: Hybrid AST + AI Codemod workflow for migrating Brownie projects to Ape Framework.
author: rouma

scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run workflow:validate && npm run fixtures:validate
scripts.fixtures:validate: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const required=['package.json','tsconfig.json','workflow.yaml','README.md','.codemod/config.json','real-repo-test.md','real-repo-test-results.md','HACKATHON-SUBMISSION.md','submission-ready-checklist.md'];for(const file of required)fs.accessSync(file);const files=fs.readdirSync('fixtures').filter((file)=>/\.(py|ya?ml)$/.test(file));const before=files.filter((file)=>file.includes('.before.')).map((file)=>file.replace('.before.','.')).sort();const after=files.filter((file)=>file.includes('.after.')).map((file)=>file.replace('.after.','.')).sort();if(before.length<15)throw new Error('expected at least 15 fixture pairs');if(JSON.stringify(before)!==JSON.stringify(after))throw new Error('fixture before/after mismatch: '+JSON.stringify({before,after}));const workflow=fs.readFileSync('workflow.yaml','utf8');if(!workflow.includes('js-ast-grep:')||!workflow.includes('language: python')||!workflow.includes('language: yaml')||workflow.lastIndexOf('ai:')<workflow.lastIndexOf('language: yaml'))throw new Error('workflow must run Python/YAML JSSG steps before the AI step');console.log('ok: '+before.length+' fixture pairs')"
